_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of intelligence employment requirements (i.e., logistical, communications support, maneuverability, legal restrictions, etc.).
reference_document_element_description: Conduct data and AI workforce planning, including current-state skills assessment, future-state requirements modeling, gap analysis, and talent acquisition and development strategy formulation.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-K-013 (AG, cosine: 0.554), RC-K-005 (RC, cosine: 0.554).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.498). Shared vocabulary: [requirements]. DCWF-only terms [communications, employment, etc, i, intelligence, knowledge] vs WIDAI-only terms [acquisition, ai, analysis, assessment, conduct, current] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.852 (P=0.854, R=0.849). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.4%, N:73.6%, C:26.0%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of intelligence employment requirements (i.e., logistical, communicati" vs "Conduct data and AI workforce planning, including current-state skills assessmen" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.558 > STS 0.498 (gap +0.060). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [requirements] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 2.9%. Shared tokens: [requirements]. DCWF-only: [communications, employment, etc, i, intelligence, knowledge]. WIDAI-only: [acquisition, ai, analysis, assessment, conduct, current].
